case_title: BJORK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC. VS. JOSEPH ILLINGWORTH

docket_entries.description: FIRST APPEARANCE FEES FILED BY RESPONDENT ILLINGWORTH, JOSEPH ALL COLOR PAINTING
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-25-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER BJORK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER BJORK CONSTRUCTION CO INC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PARTIES HAVE REACHED A STIPULATION. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED AND FILED THIS DATE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD;, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER BJORK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC. HEARING SET FOR FEB-13-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER BJORK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC.
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER BJORK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC. AS TO RESPONDENT ILLINGWORTH, JOSEPH ALL COLOR PAINTING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER BJORK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC. NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD CONTINUED FROM FEB-13-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT FEB-25-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER BJORK CONSTRUCTION CO. INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ILLINGWORTH, JOSEPH ALL COLOR PAINTING $59,511.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $59,511.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
